positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a mystical forest meeting a vibrant alien sky. The scene is dominated by oversized, abstract foliage and crystalline structures that appear to defy gravity. Foreground elements include stylized fauna – minimalist, symmetrical creatures with bioluminescent accents. Utilize a retro-futuristic aesthetic mixed with sacred geometry. The color palette should be rich teals, electric lavender, deep indigo, and pops of neon orange for high contrast. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a circular crop. The overall style should emulate complex, detailed linocut engraving mixed with digital stained-glass vibrancy, giving the print a sophisticated, wearable feel. High contrast, clean outlines, flat graphic elements.
